wordplay_note: A poet's name for a woman-shaped weapon
card_description: Tasso (meaning "Tasso = badger / Torquato Tasso (poet)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Second Variety*. Woman who turns out to be a Third Variety robot — the most advanced human simulacrum. Name note: A poet's name for a woman-shaped weapon. The android lover — trust destroyed by perfect imitation. First appears in *Second Variety*.

reference.brief: Woman who turns out to be a Third Variety robot — the most advanced human simulacrum
reference.significance: The android lover — trust destroyed by perfect imitation
